Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 15 

CARE_LVL_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Level of Care Status Code for LTSS — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The level of care required to meet a beneficiary's needs and to determine LTSS program eligibility; 
most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CARE_LVL_STUS_CD 

LONG NAME: CARE_LVL_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual
